hero.title: Accessibility
hero.lead: IATF aims to keep this website simple, readable, keyboard-accessible, and compatible with assistive technologies.
support: For web accessibility, IATF uses [W3C WAI](https://www.w3.org/WAI/) as its primary standards reference. Practical accessibility is also informed by the direct experience of users of assistive technologies.

paragraphs: If you find an accessibility barrier on this website, please report it by email:
items: the page where the issue happened
what you were trying to do
what assistive technology, browser, or device you were using, if relevant
report.footnote: You do not need to write a formal bug report. A clear description is enough.

paragraphs: Accessibility issues may be summarized in the relevant public repository so they can be fixed in the open. Personal contact details and unnecessary private information are removed before publication.
If your report includes private information, say so clearly in the message.
This site is intentionally small and mostly static. Some language versions may be incomplete while translations are being prepared.
